visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey t-shirt and a white bib/apron, stands before a blue and white promotional backdrop. She holds a black tablet in her right hand showing a video of a man and raises her left hand with fingers splayed, squinting one eye in a playful expression. (2) The woman performs a rhythmic 'summoning' gesture, curling her fingers inward while moving the tablet towards and away from the lens in sync with a beat. The background lighting is bright and even, characteristic of an indoor event or studio setup. (3) She transitions to an expression of exaggerated shock with her mouth wide open and eyes wide, gesturing towards the space beside her where a man in a black shirt suddenly appears. (4) The woman and the man, now both in the frame, smile and wave enthusiastically at the camera. The man strikes a 'thinking' pose with his hand on his chin before waving. Bright yellow text overlays appear throughout these movements.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV 我只是會一點召喚術 😜. [Subtitle]: (🇰🇷 / 有璟 / 明星召喚師). (2) [Variety]: 變魔術???. (3) [Variety]: OMG 😍. [Slogan]: 是曹政奭本人欸 😍. (4) [Slogan]: 請多期待小心意影片喔!!!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator initially, joined by 1 male celebrity in the latter half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in a grey tee and white apron; a man in a black button-up shirt (Korean actor Jo Jung-suk).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blue promotional backdrop with large white and black text including 'MY DAUGHTER' and '全台熱'.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-tempo, rhythmic electronic beat begins, featuring a recurring vocal sample that sounds like 'Donger' or 'Um-ge'. The sample has a high pitch and consistent inflection. (2) A sharp, percussive 'thud' or 'pop' sound effect triggers in sync with the visual summoning motion, repeated four times. (3) A magical 'sparkle' sound effect with high-frequency resonance plays as the atmosphere shifts, followed by a rapid-fire sequence of the 'Donger' vocal sample. (4) The BGM continues with high energy and a heavy, synthetic bassline until the video ends abruptly. No natural human speech is present; only the edited music and SFX tracks are audible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create an entertaining short-form 'magic trick' or 'summoning' meme to celebrate meeting the Korean actor Jo Jung-suk at a promotional event.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The background features promotional text for a specific project ('My Daughter').

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media interaction video utilizing a popular 'summoning' audio trend to showcase a celebrity appearance.
